html:
Exclusive to:  

“Wearer's wetness will slowly rise up to 33%”

-

The Fashion Melon is a wearable Dress Item found in the Clothing Filter and Summer Items Filter. It requires 1 Watermelon and 3 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

It grants 120 points of protection from Overheating, provides a cooling effect of 55°, and will drain the player's Sanity by 2 points per minute. Despite providing some protection from Rain, the Fashion Melon will gradually increase the player's Wetness up to a maximum of 33. The Fashion Melon does not have a durability, but instead rots after 3 days, in a similar fashion to the Ham Bat, Garland, and Ice Cube.

Wearing the Fashion Melon while playing with WX-78 will cause the player to take damage periodically.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Fashion Pumpkin skin was introduced during the official Hallowed Nights event in 2018.
  • The Loyal Banandana skin is available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Loyal Melon Bowler skin was given to everyone for entering the game from June 27, 2024.
Woven - Elegant
Hallowed Nights Collection
Fashion Pumpkin
Fashionable accessory for those forced to wander this world on Halloween Night.
See ingame

Banandana
Headwear so a-peeling, it's bananas.
Loyal

A melon for your melon.

Trivia

  • The Fashion Melon was first revealed in the A Feet Of Strength trailer for the Reign Of Giants March 12, 2014 beta.

"watermelonhat"
“Let the juice run down your face.”
–Wilson
“Well, that's one use for this fruit.”
–Willow
“Why not wear melon on head! Haha!”
–Wolfgang
“It's sticky on my head. Yuck.”
–Wendy
“HAT SEEMS INCOMPATIBLE WITH MY FUNCTION”
–WX-78
“That's certainly one thing you could do with a watermelon.”
–Wickerbottom
“You can call me Mr. Melon.”
–Woodie
“This is one way to keep cool. And sticky.”
–Maxwell
“It's sticky and made with sticks. Fascinating!”
–Wagstaff
“It's almöst like wearing a pelt.”
–Wigfrid
“This is the best idea we have ever had.”
–Webber
“Next best thing to a watermelon bikini.”
–Walani
“Aaaahhhhhh sweet relief...”
–Warly
“I love me water fruits but this be ridiculous.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HEAD BE STICKY”
–Wilba
“Watery head thing”
–Wormwood
“Admit it. I look good in this.”
–Wheeler
“A melon for your melon.”
–Winona
“Sticky horns await.”
–Wortox
“Think me like fa-shun, florp!”
–Wurt
“This feels silly...”
–Walter
“Believe it or not, it's actually quite practical.”
–Wanda
“Wearer's wetness will slowly rise up to 33%”
-
The Fashion Melon is a wearable Dress Item found in the Clothing Filter and Summer Items Filter. It requires 1 Watermelon and 3 Twigs to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.
It grants 120 points of protection from Overheating, provides a cooling effect of 55°, and will drain the player's Sanity by 2 points per minute. Despite providing some protection from Rain, the Fashion Melon will gradually increase the player's Wetness up to a maximum of 33. The Fashion Melon does not have a durability, but instead rots after 3 days, in a similar fashion to the Ham Bat, Garland, and Ice Cube.
Wearing the Fashion Melon while playing with WX-78 will cause the player to take damage periodically.

The Loyal Banandana skin is available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Loyal Melon Bowler skin was given to everyone for entering the game from June 27, 2024.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Dưa Thời Trang là một Vật phẩm Trang phục có thể mặc được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Quần áo và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Mùa hè. Nó cần 1 Dưa Hấu và 3 Cành Cây để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu.
